mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM userdb.character_info WHERE level >= 10 AND account_name = #{accountName}
mapper.update: UPDATE userdb.character_info SET banned = #{banned} WHERE account_name = #{accountName}
UPDATE userdb.character_info SET is_online = 0 WHERE account_name = #{accountName}
UPDATE userdb.character_info SET last_seen_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE name = #{name}
mapper.select: SELECT account_name FROM userdb.character_info WHERE name = #{name}
mapper.update: UPDATE userdb.character_info SET experience = #{experience} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT account_name FROM userdb.character_info WHERE name = #{name}
mapper.update: UPDATE userdb.character_info SET gm_level = #{gmLevel} WHERE name = #{name}
mapper.select: SELECT account_name FROM userdb.character_info WHERE name = #{name} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, account_name FROM userdb.character_info WHERE name = #{name}
SELECT id, account_name, level, experience, gold, job_code, clan_id, clan_permission, last_seen_date, last_stage FROM userdb.character_info WHERE name = #{name}
SELECT clan_id FROM userdb.character_info WHERE name = #{name}
mapper.update: UPDATE userdb.character_info SET name = #{newName} WHERE name = #{oldName}
UPDATE userdb.character_info SET level = #{level}, experience = #{experience} WHERE name = #{name}
UPDATE userdb.character_info SET job_code = #{jobCode} WHERE name = #{name}
UPDATE userdb.character_info SET level = #{level}, job_code = #{jobCode}, experience = #{experience}, gold = #{gold} WHERE name = #{name}
UPDATE userdb.character_info SET level = #{level}, experience = #{experience} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT job_code FROM userdb.character_info WHERE name = #{name}
SELECT title, dialog_skin FROM userdb.character_info WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE userdb.character_info SET dialog_skin = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE userdb.character_info SET aura = #{aura} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE userdb.character_info SET title = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE userdb.character_info SET title = #{title} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE userdb.character_info SET experience = #{experience}, last_seen_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE userdb.character_info SET experience = (experience + #{delta}), last_seen_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM userdb.character_info WHERE name = #{name}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM userdb.character_info WHERE account_name = #{accountName}
SELECT old_head, fsp FROM userdb.character_info WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE userdb.character_info SET is_online = 1, job_code = #{jobCode}, last_seen_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT clan_id FROM userdb.character_info WHERE name = #{name}
mapper.update: UPDATE userdb.character_info SET fsp = #{fsp} WHERE name = #{name}
UPDATE userdb.character_info SET job_code = #{jobCode}, level = #{level} WHERE name = #{name}
UPDATE userdb.character_info SET level_up_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM userdb.character_info WHERE name = #{name}
mapper.update: UPDATE userdb.character_info SET old_head = #{oldHead} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT old_head FROM userdb.character_info WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE userdb.character_info SET bless_castle_score = #{blessCastleScore} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT account_name, name, bless_castle_score FROM userdb.character_info ORDER BY bless_castle_score DESC LIMIT 3
SELECT name, job_code, bless_castle_score FROM userdb.character_info ORDER BY bless_castle_score DESC LIMIT 3
SELECT bless_castle_score FROM userdb.character_info WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE userdb.character_info SET bless_castle_score = 0
